ess.name: Evolutionarily Stable Strategy
ess.equation: E(σ*,σ*) > E(σ,σ*)  OR  [= AND E(σ*,σ) > E(σ,σ)]

ising_model.name: Ising Model
ising_model.equation: H = −J Σ sᵢsⱼ − h Σ sᵢ

kalman_filter.name: Kalman Filter
kalman_filter.equation: x̂ = x̂⁻ + K(y − Cx̂⁻);  K = P⁻Cᵀ(CP⁻Cᵀ+R)⁻¹

pontryagin.name: Pontryagin Maximum Principle
pontryagin.equation: H(x,u,λ) = L + λᵀf;  λ̇ = −∂H/∂x;  u* = argmin H

hopfield_network.name: Hopfield Network
hopfield_network.equation: E = −½ Σ wᵢⱼ sᵢ sⱼ;  sᵢ ← sgn(Σⱼ wᵢⱼ sⱼ)

structure_mapping.name: Structure Mapping Theory (Gentner)
structure_mapping.equation: Analogy: Source → Target via M: {(sᵢ,tᵢ)} preserving relations

persistent_homology.name: Persistent Homology (TDA)
persistent_homology.equation: βₖ(ε) = rank Hₖ(VR(X,ε));  persistence = death − birth

morse_theory.name: Morse Theory
morse_theory.equation: χ(M) = Σ (−1)^k cₖ;  ∇f(p)=0 ⇒ index(p) = # negative eigenvalues of Hf

category_theory.name: Category Theory
category_theory.equation: F: C → D (functor);  η: F ⇒ G (natural transformation);  F ⊣ G (adjunction)

noether_theorem.name: Noether's Theorem
noether_theorem.equation: continuous symmetry G ⟹ conserved current Jμ:  ∂μJμ = 0

percolation_theory.name: Percolation Theory
percolation_theory.equation: P∞(p) ~ (p − pₖ)^β  for p > pₖ;  ξ(p) ~ |p − pₖ|^{−ν}

variational_inference.name: Variational Inference (ELBO)
variational_inference.equation: ELBO = E_q[log p(x,z)] − E_q[log q(z)] ≤ log p(x);  KL(q‖p) = log p(x) − ELBO

lotka_volterra.name: Lotka-Volterra Equations
lotka_volterra.equation: dx/dt = αx − βxy;  dy/dt = δxy − γy

natural_gradient.name: Natural Gradient Descent
natural_gradient.equation: θ_{t+1} = θ_t − η F(θ)⁻¹ ∇L(θ);  F(θ)ᵢⱼ = E[(∂log p/∂θᵢ)(∂log p/∂θⱼ)]

spin_glass.name: Spin Glass (Edwards-Anderson)
spin_glass.equation: H = −Σᵢⱼ Jᵢⱼ sᵢsⱼ − Σᵢ hᵢsᵢ;  Jᵢⱼ ~ N(0,J²/N);  q = (1/N)Σᵢ ⟨sᵢ⟩²

policy_gradient.name: Policy Gradient (REINFORCE)
policy_gradient.equation: ∇J(θ) = E_π[∇log π(a|s;θ) · (R − b)];  θ ← θ + α∇J(θ)

dissipative_structures.name: Dissipative Structures (Prigogine)
dissipative_structures.equation: dᵢS/dt ≥ 0;  dS/dt = dᵢS/dt + dₑS/dt;  far from equilibrium: dₑS/dt < 0 possible

nash_equilibrium.name: Nash Equilibrium
nash_equilibrium.equation: σ* ∈ NE ⟺ ∀i, uᵢ(σ*) ≥ uᵢ(σ'ᵢ, σ*₋ᵢ);  BR(σ₋ᵢ) = argmax uᵢ(σᵢ, σ₋ᵢ)

boltzmann_machine.name: Boltzmann Machine
boltzmann_machine.equation: P(v) = Σ_h exp(−E(v,h))/Z;  E(v,h) = −v^TWh − b^Tv − c^Th;  ΔW = ⟨vh^T⟩_data − ⟨vh^T⟩_model

compressed_sensing.name: Compressed Sensing
compressed_sensing.equation: y = Φx, x sparse;  x* = argmin ‖x‖₁ s.t. Φx = y;  RIP: (1−δ)‖x‖₂² ≤ ‖Φx‖₂² ≤ (1+δ)‖x‖₂²

gauge_theory.name: Gauge Theory
gauge_theory.equation: Dμ = ∂μ + igAμ;  Fμν = ∂μAν − ∂νAμ + ig[Aμ,Aν];  L = −(1/4)FμνF^μν + ψ̄(iD̸−m)ψ

quantum_information.name: Quantum Information (Density Matrix)
quantum_information.equation: ρ = Σᵢ pᵢ|ψᵢ⟩⟨ψᵢ|;  S(ρ) = −Tr(ρ ln ρ);  ∂ρ/∂t = −i[H,ρ] + Σ LρL† − ½{L†L,ρ}

simulated_annealing.name: Simulated Annealing
simulated_annealing.equation: P(accept) = min(1, exp(−ΔE / T));  T(t) → 0;  π(x) ∝ exp(−E(x)/T)

sparse_coding.name: Sparse Coding / Efficient Neural Coding
sparse_coding.equation: x = Φa + ε;  a* = argmin ‖x − Φa‖₂² + λ‖a‖₁;  ΔΦ = η(x − Φa)a^T

simplicial_homology.name: Simplicial Homology
simplicial_homology.equation: Hₙ(K) = ker ∂ₙ / im ∂ₙ₊₁;  ∂ₙ∂ₙ₊₁ = 0;  χ(K) = Σ (−1)ⁿ βₙ

general_equilibrium.name: General Equilibrium (Arrow-Debreu)
general_equilibrium.equation: Σᵢ xᵢ(p) = Σᵢ ωᵢ;  xᵢ(p) = argmax uᵢ(x) s.t. p·x ≤ p·ωᵢ;  ∃p*: z(p*) = 0

variational_autoencoder.name: Variational Autoencoder (VAE)
variational_autoencoder.equation: ELBO = E_q[log p(x|z)] − KL(q(z|x) ‖ p(z));  q(z|x) = N(μ(x), σ²(x));  z = μ + σε

attention_mechanism.name: Attention Mechanism (Transformers)
attention_mechanism.equation: Attn(Q,K,V) = softmax(QK^T/√d)V;  softmax(zᵢ) = exp(zᵢ)/Σⱼ exp(zⱼ);  MultiHead = Concat(head₁,...,headₕ)W

hamilton_jacobi_bellman.name: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation
hamilton_jacobi_bellman.equation: −∂V/∂t = min_u [L(x,u) + (∂V/∂x)f(x,u)];  V(x,T) = Φ(x);  u* = argmin H(x,u,∇V)

sgd_as_langevin.name: SGD as Langevin Dynamics
sgd_as_langevin.equation: θ_{t+1} = θ_t − η∇L̃(θ_t);  ∇L̃ = ∇L + ε, ε ~ N(0, Σ/B);  θ(t) ~ exp(−L(θ)/η) as t→∞

diffusion_model.name: Diffusion Model (Score Matching)
diffusion_model.equation: q(xₜ|x₀) = N(√ᾱₜx₀, (1−ᾱₜ)I);  p_θ(x_{t-1}|xₜ) = N(μ_θ(xₜ,t), σ²I);  L = E‖ε − ε_θ(xₜ,t)‖²

random_matrix_theory.name: Random Matrix Theory
random_matrix_theory.equation: ρ(λ) = (1/2πσ²)√(4σ²−λ²);  P(M) ∝ exp(−N Tr V(M));  R₂(λ₁,λ₂) = ρ(λ₁)ρ(λ₂) − sin²(π(λ₁−λ₂)ρ)/(π(λ₁−λ₂))²

reservoir_computing.name: Reservoir Computing / Echo State Networks
reservoir_computing.equation: h(t+1) = tanh(W_in x(t) + W h(t));  y(t) = W_out h(t);  W_out = argmin ‖Y − W_out H‖²

maximum_likelihood.name: Maximum Likelihood Estimation
maximum_likelihood.equation: θ_ML = argmax Σᵢ log p(xᵢ|θ);  ∂/∂θ Σ log p(xᵢ|θ) = 0;  Var(θ_ML) → I(θ)⁻¹ as n→∞

kernel_methods.name: Kernel Methods / RKHS
kernel_methods.equation: k(x,x') = ⟨φ(x),φ(x')⟩_H;  f*(x) = Σᵢ αᵢk(xᵢ,x);  α = (K + λI)⁻¹y;  K = Mercer kernel matrix

constraint_satisfaction.name: Constraint Satisfaction / SAT
constraint_satisfaction.equation: Find x: ∧ᵢ Cᵢ(x) = true;  E(x) = Σᵢ (1−Cᵢ(x));  α_c: phase transition at clause/variable ratio

autopoiesis.name: Autopoiesis
autopoiesis.equation: dXᵢ/dt = P(X,E) − D(Xᵢ);  boundary: B(X) self-maintains;  organization: O(X) = O(X(t)) ∀t

lagrangian_mechanics.name: Lagrangian Mechanics
lagrangian_mechanics.equation: L = T − V;  δS = δ∫L dt = 0;  d/dt(∂L/∂q̇) − ∂L/∂q = 0 (Euler-Lagrange)

mcmc.name: Markov Chain Monte Carlo
mcmc.equation: π(x') T(x'→x) = π(x) T(x→x');  α = min(1, π(x')q(x|x')/π(x)q(x'|x));  x ~ π as t→∞

expectation_maximization.name: Expectation Maximization (EM)
expectation_maximization.equation: E: Q(z) = p(z|x,θ_old);  M: θ_new = argmax E_Q[log p(x,z|θ)];  L(θ) ↑ monotonically

information_bottleneck.name: Information Bottleneck
information_bottleneck.equation: min I(X;T) − β I(T;Y);  p(t|x) = p(t)/Z exp(−β Σ_y p(y|x) log p(y|x)/p(y|t))

pontryagin_maximum.name: Pontryagin Maximum Principle
pontryagin_maximum.equation: H(x,u,λ) = L(x,u) + λ^T f(x,u);  u* = argmax H;  ẋ = ∂H/∂λ, λ̇ = −∂H/∂x;  λ(T) = ∂Φ/∂x(T)

neural_tangent_kernel.name: Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK)
neural_tangent_kernel.equation: Θ(x,x') = ⟨∇_θf(x),∇_θf(x')⟩;  df/dt = −Θ(X,X)(f(X)−Y);  Θ → Θ∞ as width→∞

hopf_bifurcation.name: Hopf Bifurcation
hopf_bifurcation.equation: ẋ = f(x,μ);  eigenvalues λ(μ_c) = ±iω;  dRe(λ)/dμ|_{μ_c} ≠ 0;  x → limit cycle for μ > μ_c

chemical_reaction_network.name: Chemical Reaction Network Theory (CRNT)
chemical_reaction_network.equation: dc/dt = S·v(c);  v_j(c) = k_j Π cᵢ^{y_ij};  deficiency δ = n − l − s;  δ=0 → unique equilibrium

replica_method.name: Replica Method
replica_method.equation: ⟨ln Z⟩ = lim_{n→0} (⟨Z^n⟩−1)/n;  F = −(1/β) lim_{n→0} ∂/∂n ⟨Z^n⟩;  RSB: Q_ab → Parisi functional

information_geometry.name: Information Geometry
information_geometry.equation: gᵢⱼ(θ) = E[∂ᵢlog p · ∂ⱼlog p] = I(θ)ᵢⱼ;  Γᵢⱼₖ = E[∂ᵢ∂ⱼlog p · ∂ₖlog p];  ds² = gᵢⱼdθⁱdθʲ

lyapunov_stability.name: Lyapunov Stability Theory
lyapunov_stability.equation: V(x) > 0, V(0) = 0;  V̇(x) = ∇V·f(x) ≤ 0;  V̇ < 0 → asymptotic stability;  V̇ ≤ 0 → stability

mirror_descent.name: Mirror Descent
mirror_descent.equation: ∇φ(x_{t+1}) = ∇φ(x_t) − η∇f(x_t);  x_{t+1} = argmin{η⟨∇f,x⟩ + D_φ(x,x_t)};  D_φ = Bregman divergence

gan.name: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)
gan.equation: min_G max_D E[log D(x)] + E[log(1−D(G(z)))];  p_G → p_data at Nash equilibrium

td_learning.name: Temporal Difference Learning
td_learning.equation: δ_t = r_t + γV(s_{t+1}) − V(s_t);  V(s_t) ← V(s_t) + αδ_t;  TD(λ): e_t = γλe_{t-1} + ∇V(s_t)

spectral_graph_theory.name: Spectral Graph Theory
spectral_graph_theory.equation: Lf = λf;  L = D − A;  λ_2 = algebraic connectivity;  h(G) ≤ √(2λ_2) (Cheeger);  f_k = k-th Fiedler vector

normalizing_flows.name: Normalizing Flows
normalizing_flows.equation: x = f(z), z ~ p_z;  log p_x(x) = log p_z(f⁻¹(x)) + log|det ∂f⁻¹/∂x|;  max Σ log p_x(xᵢ)

stochastic_optimal_control.name: Stochastic Optimal Control
stochastic_optimal_control.equation: dx = f(x,u)dt + σ(x)dW;  J = E[∫L(x,u)dt + Φ(x_T)];  −∂V/∂t = min_u{L + f·∇V + ½σσᵀ:∇²V}

contrastive_learning.name: Contrastive Learning / NCE
contrastive_learning.equation: L = −log[exp(sim(z_i,z_j)/τ) / Σ_k exp(sim(z_i,z_k)/τ)];  p(d=1|x,c) = σ(f(x)ᵀf(c));  NCE → MLE as k→∞

belief_propagation.name: Belief Propagation / Message Passing
belief_propagation.equation: m_{i→j}(x_j) = Σ_{x_i} ψ(x_i,x_j) φ(x_i) Π_{k∈N(i)\j} m_{k→i}(x_i);  b(x_i) ∝ φ(x_i) Π_{j∈N(i)} m_{j→i}(x_i)

map_estimation.name: Maximum a Posteriori (MAP) Estimation
map_estimation.equation: θ_MAP = argmax p(θ|x) = argmax [log p(x|θ) + log p(θ)];  ∇log p(x|θ) + ∇log p(θ) = 0;  MAP → MLE as prior → flat

wasserstein_gan.name: Wasserstein GAN
wasserstein_gan.equation: min_G max_D E[D(x)] − E[D(G(z))];  W(p,q) = sup_{||D||_L≤1} E_p[D] − E_q[D];  Kantorovich-Rubinstein duality

mcts.name: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS)
mcts.equation: UCB1: a* = argmax[Q(s,a) + c√(ln N(s)/N(s,a))];  V(s) = 1/N Σ R_i;  backup: N(s)+=1, Q(s,a) += (R−Q)/N

bayesian_optimization.name: Bayesian Optimization
bayesian_optimization.equation: x_{n+1} = argmax α(x; D_n);  α_EI(x) = E[max(f(x)−f*,0)];  f ~ GP(μ,k);  p(f|D) ∝ p(D|f)p(f)

expectation_propagation.name: Expectation Propagation (EP)
expectation_propagation.equation: q(θ) = 1/Z Π f̃ᵢ(θ);  f̃ᵢ ← proj[q^\i · fᵢ] / q^\i;  proj = moment matching to exponential family;  q^\i = q/f̃ᵢ

tensor_network.name: Tensor Network / Tensor Decomposition
tensor_network.equation: Ψ = Σ A^{s1} A^{s2} ... A^{sN};  MPS: Ψ_{s1...sN} = Tr(A^{s1}...A^{sN});  SVD truncation: ||Ψ − Ψ̃|| ≤ ε

multi_armed_bandit.name: Multi-Armed Bandit / UCB
multi_armed_bandit.equation: UCB: a* = argmax[μ̂ₐ + c√(ln t / Nₐ)];  regret R_T = T μ* − Σ μ_{aₜ};  Thompson: sample θₐ ~ posterior, play argmax θₐ

stein_variational.name: Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD)
stein_variational.equation: xᵢ ← xᵢ + ε φ*(xᵢ);  φ* = argmax_{||φ||≤1} −d/dε KL(T_ε q || p);  φ*(x) = E_q[k(x',x)∇log p(x') + ∇_{x'}k(x',x)]

neural_ode.name: Neural ODE
neural_ode.equation: dh/dt = f_θ(h,t);  h(T) = h(0) + ∫₀ᵀ f_θ(h,t)dt;  adjoint: da/dt = −aᵀ ∂f/∂h;  ∂L/∂θ = −∫ aᵀ ∂f/∂θ dt

causal_inference.name: Causal Inference / do-calculus
causal_inference.equation: P(y|do(x)) = Σ_z P(y|x,z)P(z);  backdoor: P(y|do(x)) = Σ_z P(y|x,z)P(z);  frontdoor;  counterfactual: Y_x(u)

gaussian_process.name: Gaussian Process Regression
gaussian_process.equation: f ~ GP(μ,k);  p(f*|X*,X,y) = N(K*ᵀ(K+σ²I)⁻¹y, K**−K*ᵀ(K+σ²I)⁻¹K*);  log p(y|X) = −½yᵀK⁻¹y − ½log|K| − n/2 log 2π

markov_decision_process.name: Markov Decision Process (MDP)
markov_decision_process.equation: V*(s) = max_a [R(s,a) + γ Σ P(s'|s,a)V*(s')];  π*(s) = argmax_a Q*(s,a);  Q*(s,a) = R + γ Σ P V*

contraction_mapping.name: Contraction Mapping / Banach Fixed Point
contraction_mapping.equation: T: X→X;  d(Tx,Ty) ≤ γ d(x,y), γ<1;  x* = lim T^n(x₀);  d(x_n,x*) ≤ γⁿ/(1−γ) d(x₁,x₀)

active_inference.name: Active Inference
active_inference.equation: F = E_q[log q(s) − log p(o,s)];  π* = argmin E_q(π)[G(π)];  G = E[H[P(o|s)] + D_KL[q(s|π)||p(s)]];  action = −∂F/∂a

boosting.name: Gradient Boosting / AdaBoost
boosting.equation: F_m(x) = F_{m-1}(x) + ν h_m(x);  h_m = argmin Σ L(yᵢ, F_{m-1}(xᵢ) + h(xᵢ));  wᵢ ∝ exp(−yᵢ F(xᵢ));  AdaBoost = exp loss

matrix_factorization.name: Matrix Factorization / NMF
matrix_factorization.equation: min ||X − WH||²_F;  NMF: W,H ≥ 0;  SVD: X = UΣVᵀ;  update: H ← H ⊙ (WᵀX)/(WᵀWH);  W ← W ⊙ (XHᵀ)/(WHHᵀ)

pac_learning.name: PAC Learning / VC Theory
pac_learning.equation: P(sup_{h∈H} |R(h)−R̂(h)| > ε) ≤ 2|H|e^{-2nε²};  VC: n = O(d/ε² log(1/δ));  Rademacher: R̂_n(H) = E_σ[sup_h 1/n Σ σᵢh(xᵢ)]

navier_stokes.name: Navier-Stokes Equations
navier_stokes.equation: ∂u/∂t + (u·∇)u = −∇p/ρ + ν∇²u + f;  ∇·u = 0;  Re = UL/ν;  energy: d/dt ∫½|u|² = −ν∫|∇u|² + ∫f·u

kolmogorov_complexity.name: Kolmogorov Complexity / AIT
kolmogorov_complexity.equation: K(x) = min{|p| : U(p) = x};  K(x|y) = min{|p| : U(p,y) = x};  K(x,y) ≈ K(x) + K(y|x);  incompressibility: K(x) ≥ |x| − c

minimum_description_length.name: Minimum Description Length (MDL)
minimum_description_length.equation: M* = argmin [L(D|M) + L(M)];  two-part: L(x,θ) = −log p(x|θ) + L(θ);  normalized ML: p̄(x) = p(x|θ̂(x))/∫p(y|θ̂(y))dy

lagrange_duality.name: Lagrange Duality / KKT Conditions
lagrange_duality.equation: L(x,λ,ν) = f(x) + Σλᵢgᵢ(x) + Σνⱼhⱼ(x);  d* = max_{λ≥0} min_x L;  strong duality: p*=d*;  KKT: ∇f + Σλᵢ∇gᵢ = 0, λᵢgᵢ = 0

online_convex_optimization.name: Online Convex Optimization / Regret
online_convex_optimization.equation: Regret_T = Σ f_t(x_t) − min_x Σ f_t(x);  FTRL: x_t = argmin[Σ f_s(x) + R(x)];  OGD: x_{t+1} = Π(x_t − η∇f_t)

optimal_stopping.name: Optimal Stopping / Secretary Problem
optimal_stopping.equation: V(x,t) = max{g(x,t), E[V(X_{t+1},t+1)|X_t=x]};  τ* = inf{t: V(X_t,t) = g(X_t,t)};  secretary: reject first n/e, pick next best

large_deviations.name: Large Deviations / Cramér's Theorem
large_deviations.equation: P(S_n/n ∈ A) ≈ exp(−n inf_{x∈A} I(x));  I(x) = sup_θ[θx − log M(θ)];  Sanov: I(Q) = D_KL(Q||P);  Varadhan: lim 1/n log E[e^{nF}] = sup[F−I]

ergodic_theory.name: Ergodic Theory
ergodic_theory.equation: lim 1/N Σ f(T^n x) = ∫ f dμ  a.e.;  mixing: μ(A∩T⁻ⁿB) → μ(A)μ(B);  entropy: h(T) = sup_P H(P|T⁻¹P)

mechanism_design.name: Mechanism Design / Auction Theory
mechanism_design.equation: max Σ vᵢ(a(θ)) s.t. IC: Uᵢ(θᵢ) ≥ Uᵢ(θ'ᵢ);  IR: Uᵢ(θᵢ) ≥ 0;  VCG: pᵢ = max_{a} Σ_{j≠i} vⱼ − Σ_{j≠i} vⱼ(a*(θ));  revelation principle

proximal_methods.name: Proximal Methods / ADMM
proximal_methods.equation: prox_f(x) = argmin[f(y) + ½||y−x||²];  ADMM: x←argmin[f(x)+ρ/2||Ax+Bz−c+u||²], z←argmin[g(z)+ρ/2||Ax+Bz−c+u||²], u←u+Ax+Bz−c

mean_field_game.name: Mean-Field Game
mean_field_game.equation: −∂V/∂t − ν∆V + H(x,∇V) = F(x,m);  ∂m/∂t − ν∆m − div(m∇_pH) = 0;  coupled HJB + Fokker-Planck;  Nash of N→∞ players

diffusion_maps.name: Diffusion Maps
diffusion_maps.equation: P = D⁻¹W;  Pᵗ → diffusion at scale t;  Ψ_t(x) = (λ₁ᵗψ₁(x),...,λₖᵗψₖ(x));  D_t²(x,y) = Σ λᵢ²ᵗ(ψᵢ(x)−ψᵢ(y))²

spiking_neural_network.name: Spiking Neural Network / Integrate-and-Fire
spiking_neural_network.equation: τ dV/dt = −(V−V_rest) + R·I(t);  V≥V_th ⟹ spike, V←V_reset;  STDP: Δw = A+ exp(−Δt/τ+) if pre<post, else −A− exp(Δt/τ−)

inverse_problem.name: Inverse Problem / Tikhonov Regularization
inverse_problem.equation: min ||Ax−b||² + α||Lx||²;  x_α = (AᵀA + αLᵀL)⁻¹Aᵀb;  Morozov: ||Ax_α−b|| = δ;  L-curve: trade-off ||x|| vs ||Ax−b||

robbins_monro.name: Robbins-Monro / Stochastic Approximation
robbins_monro.equation: x_{n+1} = x_n − a_n(H(x_n) + ξ_n);  Σ aₙ = ∞, Σ aₙ² < ∞;  ODE method: dx/dt = −H(x);  x_n → x* a.s.

preferential_attachment.name: Preferential Attachment / Scale-Free Networks
preferential_attachment.equation: P(new edge to i) ∝ kᵢ;  P(k) ~ k^{−γ}, γ≈3;  mean-field: dkᵢ/dt = m·kᵢ/(2mt);  kᵢ(t) = m√(t/tᵢ)

operator_semigroup.name: Operator Semigroups / Hille-Yosida
operator_semigroup.equation: du/dt = Au;  T(t) = e^{tA};  T(t+s)=T(t)T(s);  resolvent: R(λ,A) = (λI−A)⁻¹;  Hille-Yosida: ||R(λ,A)ⁿ|| ≤ M/(λ−ω)ⁿ

shapley_value.name: Shapley Value / Cooperative Games
shapley_value.equation: φᵢ(v) = Σ_{S⊆N\i} |S|!(n−|S|−1)!/n! [v(S∪{i})−v(S)];  efficiency: Σφᵢ=v(N);  linearity;  null player;  symmetry

topological_data_analysis.name: Topological Data Analysis (TDA)
topological_data_analysis.equation: VR_ε = {σ⊆X : diam(σ)≤ε};  β_k = rank H_k;  persistence: dgm = {(b_i,d_i)};  stability: d_B(dgm_f,dgm_g) ≤ ||f−g||_∞

world_model.name: World Models / Model-Based RL
world_model.equation: p̂(s'|s,a;θ);  r̂(s,a;φ);  plan: π* = argmax E_{p̂}[Σγᵗr̂];  Dyna: real experience + simulated rollouts;  model error: ||p̂−p||

calculus_of_variations.name: Calculus of Variations / Euler-Lagrange
calculus_of_variations.equation: δJ[y] = 0;  J[y] = ∫ F(x,y,y')dx;  Euler-Lagrange: ∂F/∂y − d/dx(∂F/∂y') = 0;  natural BC: ∂F/∂y'|_{∂Ω} = 0

concentration_inequalities.name: Concentration of Measure / Tail Bounds
concentration_inequalities.equation: Hoeffding: P(S_n−E[S_n]≥t) ≤ exp(−2t²/Σ(bᵢ−aᵢ)²);  McDiarmid: P(f−Ef≥t) ≤ exp(−2t²/Σcᵢ²);  sub-Gaussian: E[e^{λX}] ≤ e^{λ²σ²/2}

martingale_theory.name: Martingale Theory / Optional Stopping
martingale_theory.equation: E[X_{n+1}|F_n] = X_n;  optional stopping: E[X_τ] = E[X_0] if τ bounded;  Doob: X_n = M_n + A_n;  maximal: P(max X_k ≥ λ) ≤ E[X_n]/λ

hidden_markov_model.name: Hidden Markov Model (HMM)
hidden_markov_model.equation: P(O,S) = π_{s1} Π P(sₜ|sₜ₋₁) Π P(oₜ|sₜ);  forward: α_t(j) = Σᵢ α_{t-1}(i)aᵢⱼbⱼ(oₜ);  Baum-Welch = EM on HMM

particle_filter.name: Particle Filter / Sequential Monte Carlo
particle_filter.equation: p(xₜ|y₁:ₜ) ≈ Σ wₜⁱ δ(xₜ−xₜⁱ);  wₜⁱ ∝ p(yₜ|xₜⁱ)p(xₜⁱ|xₜ₋₁ⁱ)/q(xₜⁱ);  resample when ESS < N/2;  N_eff = 1/Σ(wⁱ)²

linear_programming.name: Linear Programming / Simplex Method
linear_programming.equation: min cᵀx s.t. Ax≤b, x≥0;  dual: max bᵀy s.t. Aᵀy≤c, y≥0;  strong duality: cᵀx* = bᵀy*;  complementary slackness

max_flow_min_cut.name: Max Flow / Min Cut
max_flow_min_cut.equation: max Σⱼ f(s,j);  s.t. f(u,v) ≤ c(u,v), Σ f(u,v) = Σ f(v,w);  max-flow = min-cut;  Ford-Fulkerson: augment along s-t paths

optimal_design.name: Optimal Experiment Design
optimal_design.equation: D-optimal: max det F(ξ);  A-optimal: min tr F(ξ)⁻¹;  F(ξ) = Σ wᵢ f(xᵢ)f(xᵢ)ᵀ;  equivalence: D-optimal iff max d(x,ξ*) = p

pareto_optimization.name: Multi-Objective / Pareto Optimization
pareto_optimization.equation: min (f₁(x),...,fₖ(x));  Pareto: x* if ∄x: fᵢ(x)≤fᵢ(x*) ∀i, strict for some;  scalarization: min Σλᵢfᵢ(x);  ε-constraint

domain_adaptation.name: Domain Adaptation / Distribution Shift
domain_adaptation.equation: R_T(h) ≤ R_S(h) + d_H(S,T) + λ*;  importance weighting: E_T[ℓ] = E_S[w(x)ℓ], w=p_T/p_S;  DANN: min_θ max_d L_task − λL_domain

empirical_risk_minimization.name: Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM)
empirical_risk_minimization.equation: R̂(h) = 1/n Σ ℓ(h(xᵢ),yᵢ);  h* = argmin R̂(h);  R(h) ≤ R̂(h) + O(√(VC(H)/n));  structural risk: min R̂ + Ω(H)

ito_calculus.name: Itô Calculus / SDE Theory
ito_calculus.equation: dXₜ = μ(Xₜ)dt + σ(Xₜ)dWₜ;  Itô: df = (∂f/∂t + μ∂f/∂x + ½σ²∂²f/∂x²)dt + σ∂f/∂x dW;  Girsanov: dW̃ = dW + θdt

sat_solving.name: Boolean Satisfiability / SAT Solving
sat_solving.equation: φ = ∧ᵢ Cᵢ, Cᵢ = ∨ⱼ lᵢⱼ;  DPLL: unit propagation + branching;  CDCL: conflict analysis → learned clause;  random k-SAT: α_c(k) ≈ 2ᵏ ln2

fourier_analysis.name: Fourier Analysis / Spectral Decomposition
fourier_analysis.equation: f(x) = Σ cₙ eⁱⁿˣ;  F(ω) = ∫f(t)e⁻ⁱωᵗdt;  Parseval: ∫|f|² = Σ|cₙ|²;  convolution: F(f*g) = F(f)·F(g);  sampling: f_s ≥ 2f_max

wavelet_theory.name: Wavelet Theory / Multiresolution
wavelet_theory.equation: f = Σ⟨f,ψⱼₖ⟩ψⱼₖ;  ψⱼₖ(t) = 2^{j/2}ψ(2ʲt−k);  MRA: V_j ⊂ V_{j+1};  φ(t) = √2 Σ hₖ φ(2t−k);  ||f||² = Σ|⟨f,ψⱼₖ⟩|²

black_scholes.name: Black-Scholes / Option Pricing
black_scholes.equation: ∂V/∂t + ½σ²S²∂²V/∂S² + rS∂V/∂S − rV = 0;  C = SN(d₁) − Ke⁻ʳᵀN(d₂);  Δ-hedge: dΠ = rΠdt;  risk-neutral: E^Q[e⁻ʳᵀ payoff]

markowitz_portfolio.name: Markowitz Portfolio / Mean-Variance
markowitz_portfolio.equation: min wᵀΣw s.t. wᵀμ=r, wᵀ1=1;  efficient frontier: σ²(r) = a r² − 2br + c;  Sharpe: max (wᵀμ−r_f)/√(wᵀΣw);  CAPM: E[rᵢ]−r_f = βᵢ(E[r_m]−r_f)

sir_model.name: SIR / Epidemiological Model
sir_model.equation: dS/dt = −βSI;  dI/dt = βSI − γI;  dR/dt = γI;  R₀ = β/γ;  herd immunity: S < 1/R₀;  final size: 1−R∞ = e^{−R₀R∞}

curry_howard.name: Curry-Howard Correspondence / Type Theory
curry_howard.equation: Γ ⊢ t : A  ≅  proof of A from Γ;  A→B ≅ implication;  A×B ≅ conjunction;  Π(x:A).B(x) ≅ ∀x.B;  Σ(x:A).B(x) ≅ ∃x.B

quantum_computing.name: Quantum Computing / Gate Model
quantum_computing.equation: |ψ⟩ = Σ αᵢ|i⟩;  U = Π Gⱼ;  Grover: O(√N) search;  Shor: period finding via QFT;  ||ψ||² = 1;  decoherence: ρ → Σ EₖρEₖ†

community_detection.name: Community Detection / Modularity
community_detection.equation: Q = 1/(2m) Σ [Aᵢⱼ − kᵢkⱼ/(2m)] δ(cᵢ,cⱼ);  SBM: P(Aᵢⱼ=1) = p if cᵢ=cⱼ, q otherwise;  detection threshold: (p−q)²/[2(p+q)] = log n

wright_fisher.name: Wright-Fisher / Population Genetics
wright_fisher.equation: E[pₜ₊₁] = p(1+s)/(1+sp);  drift: Var(Δp) = p(1−p)/(2N);  diffusion: ∂f/∂t = 1/(4N)∂²(p(1-p)f)/∂p² − s∂(p(1-p)f)/∂p;  fixation: u(p) ≈ (1−e⁻⁴ᴺˢᵖ)/(1−e⁻⁴ᴺˢ)

quantum_error_correction.name: Quantum Error Correction
quantum_error_correction.equation: [[n,k,d]] code;  syndrome: s = Hε;  Knill-Laflamme: ⟨ψᵢ|E†ₐEᵦ|ψⱼ⟩ = Cₐᵦδᵢⱼ;  threshold: p < p_th → arbitrarily long computation;  toric code

schrodinger_equation.name: Schrödinger Equation
schrodinger_equation.equation: iℏ∂ψ/∂t = Ĥψ;  Ĥ = −ℏ²/2m ∇² + V;  E_n ψ_n = Ĥψ_n;  ⟨A⟩ = ⟨ψ|Â|ψ⟩;  ΔxΔp ≥ ℏ/2

heat_equation.name: Heat Equation / Diffusion PDE
heat_equation.equation: ∂u/∂t = α∇²u;  u(x,t) = ∫G(x−y,t)u₀(y)dy;  G(x,t) = (4παt)⁻ⁿ/² exp(−|x|²/4αt);  max principle: max on boundary

wave_equation.name: Wave Equation / d'Alembert
wave_equation.equation: ∂²u/∂t² = c²∇²u;  d'Alembert: u = f(x−ct) + g(x+ct);  energy: E = ½∫(u_t² + c²|∇u|²)dx;  dispersion: ω = ω(k)

score_matching.name: Score Matching / Score Function
score_matching.equation: s_θ(x) ≈ ∇_x log p(x);  J(θ) = ½E_p[||s_θ − ∇log p||²] = E_p[½||s_θ||² + tr(∇s_θ)];  DSM: J = E[||s_θ(x̃) − ∇log p(x̃|x)||²]

knowledge_distillation.name: Knowledge Distillation
knowledge_distillation.equation: L = (1−α)H(y,σ(z_s)) + α T² KL(σ(z_t/T)||σ(z_s/T));  student: small model;  teacher: large model;  dark knowledge in soft labels

cellular_automaton.name: Cellular Automaton / Rule Systems
cellular_automaton.equation: s_i(t+1) = f(s_{i-r}(t),...,s_{i+r}(t));  Rule 110: Turing complete;  Game of Life: birth if 3, survive if 2-3;  class I-IV: fixed, periodic, chaotic, complex

robust_estimation.name: Robust Estimation / M-Estimators
robust_estimation.equation: θ̂ = argmin Σ ρ(xᵢ−θ);  influence: IF(x;T,F) = lim [T((1−ε)F+εδ_x)−T(F)]/ε;  breakdown: ε* = max ε s.t. bounded;  Huber: ρ(x) = x²/2 if |x|≤k, k|x|−k²/2 else

quantum_annealing.name: Quantum Annealing / Adiabatic QC
quantum_annealing.equation: H(s) = (1−s)H_0 + sH_P;  s: 0→1;  adiabatic: T ≥ O(1/Δ²_min);  Δ = E₁−E₀;  ground state of H_P = solution

shortest_path.name: Shortest Path / Dijkstra-Bellman-Ford
shortest_path.equation: d(v) = min_{u:(u,v)∈E} [d(u) + w(u,v)];  Dijkstra: greedy + priority queue O(E log V);  Bellman-Ford: relax all edges V−1 times;  Floyd: d[i][j] = min(d[i][j], d[i][k]+d[k][j])

variational_quantum.name: Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE)
variational_quantum.equation: E(θ) = ⟨ψ(θ)|H|ψ(θ)⟩;  |ψ(θ)⟩ = U(θ)|0⟩;  θ* = argmin E(θ);  ∂E/∂θᵢ = ½[E(θᵢ+π/2) − E(θᵢ−π/2)];  E(θ) ≥ E₀

elasticity_theory.name: Elasticity / Continuum Mechanics
elasticity_theory.equation: σᵢⱼ = Cᵢⱼₖₗ εₖₗ;  εᵢⱼ = ½(∂uᵢ/∂xⱼ + ∂uⱼ/∂xᵢ);  ∇·σ + f = ρü;  W = ½∫σ:ε dV;  min Π[u] = W[u] − ∫f·u

batch_normalization.name: Batch Normalization / Layer Norm
batch_normalization.equation: x̂ = (x−μ_B)/√(σ²_B+ε);  y = γx̂ + β;  μ_B = 1/m Σ xᵢ;  σ²_B = 1/m Σ(xᵢ−μ_B)²;  smooths loss landscape

recursive_least_squares.name: Recursive Least Squares / LMS
recursive_least_squares.equation: θ̂_n = θ̂_{n-1} + K_n(y_n − φ_nᵀθ̂_{n-1});  K_n = P_{n-1}φ_n/(1+φ_nᵀP_{n-1}φ_n);  P_n = (I−K_nφ_nᵀ)P_{n-1};  LMS: θ̂ += μeφ

traveling_salesman.name: Traveling Salesman / Combinatorial Optimization
traveling_salesman.equation: min Σ d(π(i),π(i+1));  ILP: Σⱼxᵢⱼ=1, Σᵢxᵢⱼ=1;  subtour elimination;  Christofides: 3/2-approx;  LKH: k-opt local search

error_correcting_codes.name: Error-Correcting Codes / Shannon Capacity
error_correcting_codes.equation: C = max_{p(x)} I(X;Y);  AWGN: C = ½log(1+SNR);  [n,k,d] code: correct ⌊(d-1)/2⌋;  Hamming bound: Σ C(n,i) ≤ 2^{n-k};  turbo/LDPC → capacity

kernel_density_estimation.name: Kernel Density Estimation (KDE)
kernel_density_estimation.equation: f̂(x) = 1/(nh) Σ K((x−xᵢ)/h);  MISE = ∫(f̂−f)² ≈ 1/(nh)∫K² + h⁴/4(∫K''²)(∫f''²);  h* ∝ n^{-1/5};  AMISE optimal

landauer_principle.name: Landauer's Principle / Thermodynamic Computing
landauer_principle.equation: W ≥ kT ln 2 per bit erased;  S_system + S_env ≥ 0;  Maxwell demon: information → work;  Jarzynski: ⟨e^{-W/kT}⟩ = e^{-ΔF/kT}

disentangled_representations.name: Disentangled Representations / β-VAE
disentangled_representations.equation: L = E_q[log p(x|z)] − β D_KL(q(z|x)||p(z));  disentanglement: z_i ⊥ z_j;  DCI metric;  β>1 → more disentangled, less reconstruction

frank_wolfe.name: Frank-Wolfe / Conditional Gradient
frank_wolfe.equation: s_t = argmin_{s∈C} ⟨∇f(x_t), s⟩;  x_{t+1} = x_t + γ_t(s_t − x_t);  gap_t = ⟨∇f(x_t), x_t−s_t⟩;  f(x_t)−f* ≤ O(1/t)

sheaf_cohomology.name: Sheaf Cohomology / Local-to-Global
sheaf_cohomology.equation: 0 → F(X) → ΠF(Uᵢ) → ΠF(Uᵢ∩Uⱼ);  Hⁿ(X,F) = Rⁿ Γ(X,F);  Čech: Ȟⁿ = lim Hⁿ(U);  Serre duality: Hⁿ(X,F) ≅ H^{d-n}(X,F*⊗ω)ᵛ

magnetohydrodynamics.name: Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD)
magnetohydrodynamics.equation: ρ(∂v/∂t + v·∇v) = J×B − ∇p;  ∂B/∂t = ∇×(v×B) + η∇²B;  ∇·B = 0;  Alfvén: v_A = B/√(μ₀ρ);  magnetic Reynolds: Rm = vL/η

stable_matching.name: Stable Matching / Gale-Shapley
stable_matching.equation: blocking pair (m,w): m prefers w over partner, w prefers m;  stable = no blocking pair;  Gale-Shapley: O(n²);  lattice of stable matchings;  rural hospital theorem

relevance_vector_machine.name: Relevance Vector Machine / Sparse Bayes
relevance_vector_machine.equation: p(w|α) = Π N(wᵢ|0,αᵢ⁻¹);  marginal: p(t|α) = N(0, σ²I + ΦA⁻¹Φᵀ);  update αᵢ = γᵢ/μᵢ²;  prune if αᵢ→∞;  ARD prior

spectral_methods.name: Spectral Methods / Chebyshev-Galerkin
spectral_methods.equation: u_N = Σ â_k φ_k;  ⟨Lu_N − f, φ_j⟩ = 0;  Chebyshev: T_n(cos θ) = cos(nθ);  spectral convergence: |u−u_N| ≤ Ce^{−αN};  pseudospectral: collocation

homotopy_type_theory.name: Homotopy Type Theory / Univalence
homotopy_type_theory.equation: Id_A(a,b) ≃ (a =_A b);  univalence: (A ≃ B) ≃ (A =_U B);  Π(x:A).B(x);  Σ(x:A).B(x);  higher inductive types;  n-truncation ‖A‖_n

topological_quantum_computing.name: Topological Quantum Computing / Anyons
topological_quantum_computing.equation: braiding: σᵢσⱼ = σⱼσᵢ (|i−j|≥2);  σᵢσᵢ₊₁σᵢ = σᵢ₊₁σᵢσᵢ₊₁;  fusion: a×b = Σ N^c_{ab} c;  Jones polynomial from Temperley-Lieb;  gap protects qubits

differential_privacy.name: Differential Privacy
differential_privacy.equation: P[M(D)∈S] ≤ e^ε P[M(D')∈S] + δ;  Laplace: noise ~ Lap(Δf/ε);  Gaussian: σ ≥ Δf√(2ln(1.25/δ))/ε;  composition: ε_total ~ ε√k;  Rényi DP: D_α(M(D)||M(D')) ≤ ε

point_processes.name: Point Processes / Stochastic Geometry
point_processes.equation: Poisson: P(N(B)=k) = (λ|B|)^k e^{−λ|B|}/k!;  intensity: λ(x) = lim E[N(dx)]/|dx|;  Ripley K(r) = λ⁻¹E[N(b(o,r))];  Palm: P^o(·);  Papangelou: λ*(x,X) = density ratio

extremal_graph_theory.name: Extremal Graph Theory / Turán-type
extremal_graph_theory.equation: ex(n,H) = max |E(G)| s.t. H ⊄ G;  Turán: ex(n,K_{r+1}) = (1−1/r)n²/2;  Szemerédi regularity;  Ramsey: R(s,t);  graph limits: W:[0,1]²→[0,1]

social_choice.name: Social Choice / Arrow's Theorem
social_choice.equation: Arrow: no SWF satisfies U+P+IIA+ND;  Gibbard-Satterthwaite: strategyproof → dictatorial;  Condorcet: a≻b if majority prefers a;  Borda: score = Σ rank;  median voter theorem
